OPEC+ Production Decision - June 2024

Meeting Date: June 2, 2024

Decision: Extend voluntary production cuts of 2.2 million barrels per day through September 2024

Affected Countries: Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, Oman

Effective Date: July 1, 2024

Read Press Release

OPEC+ Production Adjustment - December 2023

Meeting Date: November 30, 2023

Decision: Maintain current production levels and review market conditions in first quarter 2024

Affected Countries: Saudi Arabia, Russia, Iraq, United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Kazakhstan, Algeria, Oman

Effective Date: January 1, 2024

Read Press Release

OPEC+ Voluntary Cuts - April 2023

Meeting Date: April 3, 2023

Decision: Implement voluntary production cuts totaling 1.66 million barrels per day

Affected Countries: Saudi Arabia, Iraq, United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Algeria, Kazakhstan, Oman

Effective Date: May 1, 2023

Read Press Release
